name: Thai Nua Yang Nam Tok (Waterfall Beef)
recipeIngredient: 2-3 tablespoons chopped coriander/cilantro (including the roots if possible)
2 tablespoons khao noor (see the pad thai recipe for this)
1-3 teaspoons freshly ground dried red chilis.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the marinade ingredients: fish sauce, lime juice, chopped shallots, coriander/cilantro, mint leaves, khao noor, sesame seeds, and dried red chilis.
2. Coat the steak with the marinade and marinate it for at least 3 hours.
3. Barbecue, broil, or grill the steak until it is on the rare side of medium rare. Cut into half-inch thick strips and then cut those into bite-sized pieces.
4. In a wok, heat a little oil over medium-high heat. Add the beef strips and cook for about 1 minute.
5. Immediately add all remaining ingredients and stir-fry until heated through (about 1 minute).
6. Serve with Thai sticky rice or as part of a meal with pad thai and a soup such as tom yum goong (hot and sour shrimp soup).
